languages.text: "Отнюдь, Вольный Торговец. Я внимательно слежу за тем, чтобы болевой порог не превышал пограничных значений — моя цель не навредить себе, а познать!"
"Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"
languages.original_text: "Отнюдь, Вольный Торговец. Я внимательно слежу за тем, чтобы болевой порог не превышал пограничных значений — моя цель не навредить себе, а познать!"

traits.locale_text: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"
"Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"
"Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"

languages.text: “当然不是，行商浪人。我很小心，始终将痛觉控制在临界值之下——我的目标并非自残，而是求知！”
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"

traits.locale_text: “当然不是，行商浪人。我很小心，始终将痛觉控制在临界值之下——我的目标并非自残，而是求知！”

languages.text: « Pas du tout, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je fais très attention à ce que mon niveau de douleur n'excède pas des valeurs dangereuses. Mon objectif n'est pas de souffrir, mais d'apprendre ! »
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"

traits.locale_text: « Pas du tout, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. Je fais très attention à ce que mon niveau de douleur n'excède pas des valeurs dangereuses. Mon objectif n'est pas de souffrir, mais d'apprendre ! »

languages.text: «En absoluto, Comerciante Independiente. Tengo cuidado para asegurarme de que el dolor no excede los límites de tolerancia. Mi objetivo no es sufrir, ¡es aprender!».
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"

traits.locale_text: «En absoluto, Comerciante Independiente. Tengo cuidado para asegurarme de que el dolor no excede los límites de tolerancia. Mi objetivo no es sufrir, ¡es aprender!».

languages.text: "Alakası yok Hür Tacir. Acı seviyemin asla sınır değerleri aşmamasını sağlamaya özen gösteriyorum. Amacım kendime zarar vermek değil, öğrenmek!"
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"

traits.locale_text: "Alakası yok Hür Tacir. Acı seviyemin asla sınır değerleri aşmamasını sağlamaya özen gösteriyorum. Amacım kendime zarar vermek değil, öğrenmek!"

languages.text: "Ganz und gar nicht, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich achte darauf, dass mein Schmerzniveau nie gewisse Schwellenwerte übersteigt ... ich will mir nicht selbst schaden, sondern lernen!"
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"

traits.locale_text: "Ganz und gar nicht, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}. Ich achte darauf, dass mein Schmerzniveau nie gewisse Schwellenwerte übersteigt ... ich will mir nicht selbst schaden, sondern lernen!"

languages.text: 「とんでもありません、ローグトレーダー。私は、自らの痛みの水準が限界値を超えることのないよう、細心の注意を払っています――私の目的は、自らを傷つけることではなく、学ぶことなのですから！」
languages.original_text: "Not at all, Rogue Trader. I am careful to ensure that my pain level never exceeds borderline values — my objective is not to harm myself, but to learn!"

traits.locale_text: 「とんでもありません、ローグトレーダー。私は、自らの痛みの水準が限界値を超えることのないよう、細心の注意を払っています――私の目的は、自らを傷つけることではなく、学ぶことなのですから！」
